$schema: HUMMBL layer classification map. Every committed path maps to exactly one layer (INV-7). Enforced by scripts/check_layer_map.py → B_LAYER_UNCLASSIFIED.

L4.description: Governance Canon — base120 mental models, CAES spec, MRCC schema
L4.note: Canonical L4 lives in hummbl-dev/base120. These are pinned derived copies.

L3.5.description: Deterministic Kernel — AAA validation, kernel types
L3.5.note: Canonical L3.5 lives in hummbl-dev/aaa. packages/kernel/ is a typed TS mirror that MUST conform to AAA spec.

L2.description: Platform Libraries — publishable Python and TypeScript packages
L2.note: packages/kernel/ is also L2 (typed mirror, not authoritative L3.5). All packages/ are L2.

L0.description: Infrastructure — CI, tooling, scripts, dev setup, shared data, agent identities

root_files.description: Files at repo root are classified as L0 (infrastructure/governance)

exclusions.description: Paths excluded from layer classification. These are build outputs, caches, or tooling artifacts — never committed.

resolution_order: Longest prefix match wins (e.g., packages/kernel/ matches L3.5 note before packages/ matches L2).
Root files match the root_files rule.
Anything not matching any rule triggers B_LAYER_UNCLASSIFIED.
